content.json:
## SmartScreen Web Threats

Hunt for users browsing to malicious, phishing, tech-scam, untrusted, custom-blocked, or **risky non-business category** sites (Adult, Gambling, Dating, Gaming, Streaming) surfaced by Microsoft Defender SmartScreen and Network Protection (Web Content Filtering).

Use the **Time Range**, **User (UPN)**, **Device**, and **URL contains** filters to scope. Tabs further narrow the threat category. Start with *Top Users / Domains* for triage, then pivot into *Risky User Correlation* to find users that crossed from non-business browsing into malicious activity.

parameters.name: UserUPN
parameters.label: User (Entra UPN)
parameters.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where isnotempty(InitiatingProcessAccountUpn)
| distinct InitiatingProcessAccountUpn
| order by InitiatingProcessAccountUpn asc
| project value = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, label = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn

parameters.name: DeviceName
parameters.label: Device
parameters.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where isnotempty(DeviceName)
| distinct DeviceName
| order by DeviceName asc
| project value = DeviceName, label = DeviceName

content.json: Top 25 users, devices, domains, and SmartScreen/Web-Content categories across the selected scope. Click a row to view the **same scope** filtered in the category tabs.

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category    = tostring(P.Experience),
         WebCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| extend Bucket = case(
     ActionType in ("ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited"), strcat("WebContent: ", iff(isempty(WebCategory),"(uncategorized)",WebCategory)),
     isnotempty(Category), Category,
     ActionType)
| summarize Events = count() by Bucket
| top 20 by Events desc
| render barchart
content.title: Events by Category

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend Domain = tolower(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host))
| where isnotempty(Domain)
| summarize Hits = count(), Users = dcount(InitiatingProcessAccountUpn), Devices = dcount(DeviceName) by Domain
| top 25 by Hits desc
content.title: Top 25 Domains

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(P.Experience), WebCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| summarize Hits = count(),
            Devices = dcount(DeviceName),
            Domains = dcount(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host)),
            MaliciousHits = countif(Category in ("Malicious","Phishing","TechScam")),
            RiskyHits     = countif(WebCategory has_any ("Adult","Gambling","Dating","Gaming","Streaming")),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
         by User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn
| where isnotempty(User)
| top 25 by Hits desc
content.title: Top 25 Users (with Malicious & Risky counts)

content.json: Users who triggered **both** risky non-business category events (Adult, Gambling, Dating, Gaming, Streaming) **and** SmartScreen Malicious / Phishing / TechScam events in the selected window. These are prime candidates for SOC follow-up: a browsing path that started in a low-reputation category and ended in confirmed malicious destinations.

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
let base =
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(P.Experience), WebCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| extend IsRisky     = WebCategory has_any ("Adult","Gambling","Dating","Gaming","Streaming"),
         IsMalicious = Category in ("Malicious","Phishing","TechScam");
base
| summarize
    RiskyHits      = countif(IsRisky),
    MaliciousHits  = countif(IsMalicious),
    FirstRisky     = minif(TimeGenerated, IsRisky),
    LastRisky      = maxif(TimeGenerated, IsRisky),
    FirstMalicious = minif(TimeGenerated, IsMalicious),
    LastMalicious  = maxif(TimeGenerated, IsMalicious),
    Devices        = make_set(DeviceName, 10),
    SampleRiskyUrls     = make_set_if(RemoteUrl, IsRisky, 5),
    SampleMaliciousUrls = make_set_if(RemoteUrl, IsMalicious, 5)
  by User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn
| where isnotempty(User) and RiskyHits > 0 and MaliciousHits > 0
| extend MinutesRiskyToMalicious = iff(isnotempty(FirstMalicious) and isnotempty(FirstRisky), datetime_diff('minute', FirstMalicious, FirstRisky), int(null))
| order by MaliciousHits desc, RiskyHits desc
content.title: Users with Risky+Malicious activity

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(P.Experience), WebCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| extend Severity = case(
     Category in ("Malicious","Phishing","TechScam"), "High",
     WebCategory has_any ("Adult","Gambling","Dating","Gaming","Streaming"), "Medium",
     Category in ("Untrusted","CustomBlockList","CustomPolicy"), "Low",
     "Info")
| project TimeGenerated, User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, DeviceName, Severity, Category, WebCategory, ActionType, RemoteUrl, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Full event timeline (filtered)

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend ParsedFields = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(ParsedFields.Experience)
| where isnotempty(Category)
| summarize count() by Category, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)

let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend ParsedFields = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(ParsedFields.Experience)
| where isnotempty(Category)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, FileName, BlockedUrl = RemoteUrl, Category, ActionType, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

content.json: Microsoft Defender Web Content Filtering (Network Protection) categorizes the destination (for example *Adult content*, *Gambling*, *Dating*, *Gaming*, *Streaming media*, *Liability*, *High bandwidth*, *Leisure*). These events appear in `DeviceEvents` with `ActionType in ("ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")` and the category sits in `AdditionalFields.ResponseCategory`.

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend WebCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| where isnotempty(WebCategory)
| summarize count() by WebCategory, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
content.title: Web Content Filter blocks by Category

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend WebCategory   = tostring(P.ResponseCategory),
         ParentCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategoryGroup),
         IsAudit        = tobool(P.IsAudit)
| where isnotempty(WebCategory)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, BlockedUrl = RemoteUrl, WebCategory, ParentCategory, IsAudit, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Web Content Filter events

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend WebCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| where WebCategory has_any ("Adult","Gambling","Dating","Gaming","Streaming")
| extend Domain = tolower(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host))
| summarize Hits = count(), Devices = dcount(DeviceName), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), SampleUrls = make_set(RemoteUrl, 5) by User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, WebCategory, Domain
| where isnotempty(User)
| order by Hits desc
content.title: Risky Category (Adult / Gambling / Dating / Gaming / Streaming) — by User & Domain

content.json: Events where a user **clicked through** a SmartScreen warning (`SmartScreenUserOverride`) or **bypassed** a Network Protection block (`NetworkProtectionUserBypassEvent`). These users acknowledged the risk and proceeded anyway — they are the highest-priority follow-ups in any web-threat hunt. The grid below also tags the browser that initiated the override so you can spot 3rd-party-browser bypass patterns.

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenUserOverride","NetworkProtectionUserBypassEvent")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| summarize Events = count() by ActionType, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
content.title: Override / Bypass events over time

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenUserOverride","NetworkProtectionUserBypassEvent")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend Browser = case(
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "msedge", "Edge",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "chrome", "Chrome",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "firefox", "Firefox",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "opera", "Opera",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "brave", "Brave",
     "Other")
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(coalesce(P.Experience, P.ResponseCategory))
| summarize Overrides = count(),
            Devices  = dcount(DeviceName),
            Domains  = dcount(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host)),
            Browsers = make_set(Browser, 10),
            Categories = make_set(Category, 10),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            SampleUrls = make_set(RemoteUrl, 5)
         by User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn
| where isnotempty(User)
| order by Overrides desc
content.title: Top users who overrode warnings (with browser & category)

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenUserOverride","NetworkProtectionUserBypassEvent")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(coalesce(P.Experience, P.ResponseCategory))
| where isnotempty(Category)
| summarize Hits = count() by Category
| order by Hits desc
content.title: What categories users clicked through

content.query:
let urlFilter = '{UrlContains}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenUserOverride","NetworkProtectionUserBypassEvent")
| where "*" in ('{DeviceName}') or DeviceName in ('{DeviceName}')
| where "*" in ('{UserUPN}')   or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn in ('{UserUPN}')
| where isempty(urlFilter) or RemoteUrl has urlFilter
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Browser = case(
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "msedge", "Edge",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "chrome", "Chrome",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "firefox", "Firefox",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "opera", "Opera",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "brave", "Brave",
     "Other")
| extend Category   = tostring(coalesce(P.Experience, P.ResponseCategory)),
         Application = tostring(coalesce(P.ApplicationName, P.DisplayName)),
         Allow       = tostring(P.Allow),
         IsAudit     = tostring(P.IsAudit),
         UserSid     = tostring(P.UserSid)
| project TimeGenerated, User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, DeviceName, Browser, ActionType, Category, RemoteUrl, Application, Allow, IsAudit, UserSid, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Override / Bypass events
